name: Mane 7 [summon YOU!]
description:
"You're coming to Equestria!"

"Nooooo! I don't wanna go to Equestria nooo ahhh!"

Twilight Sparkle gets lost in the sauce and gets it in her head that doing some ritual at some ancient ruin will summon the saviour of Equestria.

But, as it turns out, the ritual summons (you).

Are you the saviour of Equestria? You decide!

Basically the mane six plus Starlight, and you can be literally anything you want! Loosely based on Shadow Play, but it's nothing like Shadow Play, so dw about it.

Today's joke courtesy of Some_Ponu
creator: The Ruiner
